overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a Star Wars game showing a Jedi character traversing a misty canyon environment. The character walks and runs along a stone path, passing Imperial stormtroopers and structures, heading toward a dark cave entrance with a small companion creature following.

scene_state.functional_zone: misty canyon path with Imperial patrol

events.description: stormtroopers come into view on the right side and are passed

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the misty canyon with a small companion creature following behind

notable_agents.action: stormtroopers standing guard on the right side of the path

entered.detail: tall rocky cliff face forming the left wall of the canyon
tall rocky cliff face forming the right wall of the canyon
hazy mist filling the canyon depth creating atmospheric depth
cobblestone path winding through the canyon floor
group of Imperial stormtroopers in white armor standing on the path

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a narrow misty canyon with rocky walls on both sides. Stormtroopers are encountered and passed on the right side of the stone path. A small creature follows behind the character as they proceed deeper into the canyon.

scene_state.functional_zone: canyon path with Imperial supply structure

events.description: character transitions from walking to running

agents.ego_description: transitions from walking to running while passing a dark Imperial structure on the left

entered.detail: dark industrial container structure with illuminated panels on the left side of the path

segments.scene_description: The character continues along the canyon path, passing a large dark Imperial container structure on the left. Around the 27-second mark, the character breaks into a run. The canyon walls draw closer as the path narrows toward a dark opening ahead.

events.description: environment becomes significantly darker as the character approaches the cave entrance

agents.ego_description: running steadily toward the dark cave entrance ahead with the companion following

entered.detail: large dark opening in the canyon wall ahead leading into a cave
weathered stone ruins and rubble on the right side of the path

segments.scene_description: The character runs toward a dark cave entrance at the end of the canyon. The lighting dims significantly as the cave mouth approaches, with ancient ruins visible on the right side of the path. The misty atmosphere thickens as the character nears the dark opening.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a misty canyon that gradually narrows and darkens as it leads toward a cavernous void. It begins with the character walking along a stone path between rocky walls, passing Imperial stormtroopers on the right while a small creature follows closely behind. As the path continues, the camera glides past a large, dark Imperial container structure on the left before the character breaks into a run. The scene then shifts as the canyon walls draw closer and the lighting dims significantly, revealing ancient ruins on the right. Finally, the atmosphere thickens with mist as the character accelerates toward the looming darkness of a cave entrance.
